welcome.title: Welcome to Hotel-Living!

groups.noGroupsYet: You haven't joined any groups yet. Browse available groups below to get started!
groups.subtitle: Connect with fellow travelers and discover group travel opportunities.
groups.noGroupsDesc: Check back later for new group travel opportunities.

threeNights.title: Three Free Nights Program
threeNights.subtitle: Our Three Free Nights program rewards you for helping us grow the Hotel-Living community. For every hotel you personally present to our platform and that joins within 15 days, you'll earn three free nights.
threeNights.benefit1: Earn three free nights per successful referral
threeNights.benefit2: No limit on how many hotels you can refer
threeNights.benefit3: Help your favorite hotels gain exposure
threeNights.benefit4: Enjoy free stays at exceptional properties
threeNights.programDescription: Our Three Free Nights program rewards you for helping us grow the Hotel-Living community. For each hotel you personally introduce to our platform that joins within 15 days, you'll earn three free nights.
threeNights.step1: Recommend hotels you love and personally introduce them to Hotel-Living
threeNights.step2: The hotel must register on our platform within 15 calendar days from your referral
threeNights.step3: Once verified, you'll receive credits for three free nights
threeNights.step4: Redeem your free nights at any participating hotel on our platform
threeNights.additionalInfo: This program rewards your personal connections and referrals. The 15-day window ensures timely registrations. There's no limit to how many hotels you can refer or how many free nights you can earn!
